name: Taurus Ret
description:
Taurus Ret was born on the 19th of May, 1853. At four years old, he had an infection in his throat which caused him to become mute. When he was 10 in 1863, his mother, father and uncle all die within months of each other from different causes.

Taurus and his cousin, Sidney Oldenheim were raised by their other uncle, Rudolph Oldenheim.

Taurus Ret joined Sidney's gang on the 8th of January, 1869. He helps the gang out with robberies, heists and chores around the camp.

Before long, everything goes wrong when on December 13th, 1895. Sidney disappeared after doing a job for Ezra, he was later found blown up. Two days later, on December 15th, a whole army of Pinkertons show up at the gang's campsite and aren't merciful. The remaining members all know Abel Houston had something to do with it.

It's now December 18th, 1895. 42 year old, Taurus Ret is wandering the wilderness after he flees the lawmen who ambushed the gang. He doesn't want to head back because there may be Pinkertons lurking around the area still after three days. Taurus doesn't know who had survived and who hadn’t, but he clings to hope that he wasn’t the only one left alive.
creator: Rioter_141
